13.text: Title This Law may be cited as the “Law on the Application of Civil and Commercial Laws in the DIFC $2 0 0 4 ^ { \circ }$ .

15.text: This Law is made by the Ruler of Dubai.

17.text: This Law applies in the jurisdiction of the Dubai International Financial Centre.

19.text: This Law is enacted on the date specified in the Enactment Notice in respect of this Law.

21.text: This Law comes into force on the date specified in the Enactment Notice in respect of this Law.

23.text: Schedule 1 contains a list of defined terms used in this Law.

25.text: The objectives of this Law are to:

26.text:
(a) provide certainty as to the rights, liabilities and obligations of persons in relation to civil and commercial matters arising in the DIFC;   
(b) assist in the development of the non-statutory la...

29.text: (1) Since by virtue of Article 3 of Federal Law No. 8 of 2004, DIFC Law is able to apply in the DIFC notwithstanding any Federal Law on civil or commercial matters, the rights and liabilities between ...

30.text: (2) The relevant Jurisdiction is to be the one first ascertained under the following paragraphs:

31.text:
(a) so far as there is a regulatory content, any applicable DIFC Statute; failing which,   
(b) the law of any Jurisdiction other than that of the DIFC expressly chosen by any DIFC Statute; failing wh...

33.text:
(1) The following provisions apply where DIFC Law is the law applicable to a civil or commercial matter pursuant to Article 8 above.   
(2) The content of DIFC Law shall be determined by any applicabl...

35.text: (1) The interpretation of DIFC Statutes may be guided by:

36.text: (a) jurisprudence from common law jurisdictions regarding the interpretation and application of analogous laws; and (b) the rules and principles of statutory interpretation from common law jurisdictio...

37.text: (2) Article 8B(1) applies to all DIFC Statutes, regardless of whether the relevant DIFC Statute is based on an international model law or another non-common law source.

38.text: (3) If a DIFC Statute is based on an international model law, its interpretation may also be guided by international jurisprudence interpreting and applying the international model law, as well as int...

40.text:
(1) The DIFC Court shall determine any matter before it in accordance with the laws that may apply by virtue of Article 8.

43.text: (1) In the Law, a reference to:

44.text:
(a) a statutory provision includes a reference to the statutory provision as amended or re-enacted from time to time;   
(b) a person includes any natural person, body corporate or body unincorporate,...

45.text: (2) The headings in the Law shall not affect its interpretation.

46.text: (3) References in this Law to a body corporate include a body corporate incorporated outside DIFC.

47.text:
(4) A reference in this Law to a Part, Article or Schedule by number only, and without further identification, is a reference to the Part, Article or Schedule of that number in this Law.

49.text: References to legislation and Guidance in the Law shall be construed in accordance with the following provisions:
